permits.description: Extend rear exterior wall on three levels.  Build new roof with two new sky lights from the exisitng ridge to new exterior wall.  Add a new bathroom to the first floor and enlarge library, remodel and enlarge existing kitchen and dining room on the second floor, enlarge primary bedroom and replace the bathroom on third floor.
permits.score_reasons: high cost ($862,000); keyword: remodel; permit completed; all permits completed

llm_assessment.reasoning: The property is undergoing a massive $862,000 whole-house renovation and three-level extension that includes simultaneous updates to the kitchen and multiple bathrooms.
